center.name: 基圖洛國家公園
center.summary: 基圖洛國家公園是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联1种鸟类，包括Plateau lark，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The plateau lark (Corypha nigrescens) is a species of lark in the family Alaudidae found in east Zambia, north Malawi and south Tanzania

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: The plateau lark (Corypha nigrescens) is a species of lark in the family Alaudidae found in east Zambia, north Malawi and south Tanzania
